queries.question: Show press conferences and media scrums attended by John Doe.
queries.sql:
SELECT Events.EventName 
FROM Events JOIN Persons ON Events.PersonID = Persons.PersonID
WHERE (Events.EventType = "Press Conference" OR Events.EventType = "Media Scrum") AND Persons.FullName = "John Doe"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?eventname WHERE {
  ?events a :Events .
  ?persons a :Persons .
  ?events p:hasPersons ?persons .
  ?events p:EventName ?eventname .
  ?events p:EventType ?eventtype_w .
  ?events p:EventType ?eventtype_w2 .
  ?persons p:name ?fullname_w .
  FILTER((((STR(?eventtype_w) = "Press Conference" || STR(?eventtype_w2) = "Media Scrum")) && STR(?fullname_w) = "John Doe"))
}

PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?eventname WHERE {

  ?events p:EventName ?eventname .

  FILTER((STR(?eventtype_w) = "Press Conference" || (STR(?eventtype_w2) = "Media Scrum" && STR(?fullname_w) = "John Doe")))
}
